project.focus: Integrating Agentic Upgrades (LSP, Patching, Reactive Memory)

tasks.description: Standardize Preflight blocks across all Claude and Gemini agents (e.g., `devops_engineer`, `vibe_sentinel`). Force them to strictly read ONLY `DIGEST.md` and `UPDATE.md` upon initialization. Redundant full-folder ingestions during Tier 3 multi-agent handovers must be eliminated.
tasks.summary: Standardized preflight blocks across devops_engineer, security_engineer, decision_recorder, claude_tasks agents — removed UPDATE.md references, enforced DIGEST-first pattern, moved domain files to JIT sections; Gemini agents already compliant

tasks.description: Deprecate `UPDATE.md` globally across the AI-OS framework. Remove all dependencies on `UPDATE.md` from `src/bin/ai`, templates (`src/templates`), agent preflights, and skills (like `ai-update`, `ai-preflight`, `ai-review`). Delete `UPDATE.md` from the standard scaffolding and ensure it is never created.
tasks.summary: Deprecated UPDATE.md globally — removed from ensure_ai_templates() scaffolding, preflight() output, do_update/do_onboard/do_digest prompts, ai-preflight skill, ai-review skill, bug-reproducer skill, GEMINI.md trigger table; refactored ai-update skill to use conversation context; marked ai-update-lifecycle as DEPRECATED no-op

tasks.description: Refactor the `ai update` CLI command. It must no longer read from or rely on `UPDATE.md`. Instead, it should trigger an agent to scan the project (respecting JIT limits) and autonomously update the current project state directly into `.ai/DIGEST.md` and `.ai/state.json`.
tasks.summary: Refactored do_update() in src/bin/ai — removed UPDATE.md dependency and ensure_ai_templates call; now accepts inline intent from CLI args, triggers digest_updater agent (JIT) for DIGEST refresh, and directs task-synchronizer-mcp for state.json updates

tasks.description: Refactor all MCP servers currently relying on `UPDATE.md`. Deprecate or redesign `intent-refiner-mcp`. Update `task-synchronizer-mcp`, `risk-analyzer-mcp`, and `github-bridge-mcp` to process intent directly from CLI inputs, chat histories, or API requests, fully excising `UPDATE.md` references.
tasks.summary: Removed UPDATE.md from all three MCP servers: orchestrator-mcp (removed UPDATE.md preflight pointer, deprecated run_intent_cleanup as no-op), task-synchronizer-mcp (deprecated sync_tasks to return deprecation notice without reading UPDATE.md), github-bridge-mcp (renamed create_update_from_issues→create_intent_from_issues, fixed schema/handler name mismatch bug, removed UPDATE.md writes)

tasks.description: Propagate the "AIS: Fresh Conversations" token economics rule into the core `src/templates/RULES.md` and `src/templates/architect.md.template` files, so that all new AI-OS scaffoldings enforce the use of `/clear` between unrelated tasks to prevent exponential token bloat.
tasks.summary: Added AIS Fresh Conversations rule + 6-file JIT limit to src/templates/RULES.md; added §33 Token Economics section to src/templates/architect.md.template; synced RULES.md to .ai/RULES.md

tasks.description: Implement Architectural Fragmentation (§39). Split the monolithic `.ai/architect.md` into granular Domain Blueprints (e.g., `.ai/blueprints/core.md`, `security.md`) to reduce the session-start context tax. Update preflight scripts and templates to read the primary index file and use JIT loading for sub-blueprints. (Fulfills P-61)
tasks.summary: Implemented Architectural Fragmentation (§39) — created .ai/blueprints/ with 5 domain files (core, security, agents, mcp, governance); architect.md reduced from 490+ lines to 35-line lightweight index/router; updated orchestrator-mcp run_preflight pointer and src/templates/architect.md.template with §34 Domain Blueprints pattern

tasks.description: Implement "Metadata-Only" Default Mode for `ai sync` (§29). Ensure `ai sync` only provides Skill Summaries to agents by default, rather than full `SKILL.md` contents. Full skill content should only be injected dynamically via `activate_skill`. Update `context-invoker-mcp` accordingly. (Fulfills P-62)
tasks.summary: Metadata-only default mode for ai sync: added list_skills/list_agents tools to context-invoker-mcp (Level 1 metadata), added _generate_skills_index() to src/bin/ai that writes _SKILLS_INDEX.md (name+description) to each synced skills dir after sync_skills_20()

tasks.description: Refactor `archive-manager-mcp` to use file streams (e.g., `readline`) instead of `readFileSync` and string `split` when counting lines and words for token estimation. Loading full, potentially bloated log files into memory to count words is a robustness flaw and memory/token burner.
tasks.summary: Refactored archive-manager-mcp: replaced readFileSync + string split for line/word counting with readline createInterface streams; added countFileStats() helper — no full file load into memory

tasks.description: Refactor `context-invoker-mcp` to only read the top chunk (e.g., first 4KB or using a stream) of skill/agent files when parsing YAML frontmatter during list operations. Currently, it reads the entire content of every skill and agent into memory just to extract the `description` field, causing massive overhead.
tasks.summary: Refactored context-invoker-mcp: added readHead() helper (openSync/readSync, 4096 bytes max); listAvailable() now uses readHead instead of readFileSync — frontmatter parsing never loads full skill/agent content

tasks.description: Refactor `context-guardian-mcp` to use `git grep` or `ripgrep` via `child_process` when scanning `src/` for TODO/FIXME markers in `strict` mode, instead of recursively reading every source file completely into Node memory. Loading every file fully is a critical performance flaw and memory burner for large codebases.
tasks.summary: Refactored context-guardian-mcp strict mode: replaced scanDir recursive readFileSync loop with git grep -n -E; removed scanDir function + readdirSync/statSync imports; added spawnSync + extname; fixed pre-existing missing relative import

tasks.description: Migrate `task-synchronizer-mcp` state to SQLite to prevent race conditions.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-156

tasks.description: Implement fuzzy-patching fallback in `patch-mcp` to reduce retry turns.
tasks.summary: Handed over to Claude as E-157

tasks.description: Migrate `task-synchronizer-mcp` state to SQLite to prevent race conditions.
Implement fuzzy-patching fallback in `patch-mcp` to reduce retry turns.
